summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SuperNetworkAI new features (Iteration 4): Profile image upload/delete, Search history CRUD, Theme toggle persistence. All 31 backend tests passed. All new frontend components working correctly.
passed_tests: POST /api/profile/image - Profile image upload (multipart form data, 5MB max)
POST /api/profile/image - Invalid file type rejection (400 error)
POST /api/profile/image - Unauthenticated access (401 error)
DELETE /api/profile/image - Profile image deletion
GET /api/profile/me - Returns profile_image field
GET /api/search/history - Returns last 10 searches
GET /api/search/history - Empty list when no history
POST /api/search - Creates search history entry automatically
Search history limited to 10 entries (older entries removed)
DELETE /api/search/history/{id} - Delete single history item
DELETE /api/search/history/{id} - 404 for non-existent item
DELETE /api/search/history - Clear all history
GET /api/search/history - Unauthenticated returns 401
Static file serving at /api/uploads/profiles/ - images accessible
Search results include profile_image in response
All 17 original backend tests still passing
Landing page loads with SuperNetworkAI branding
Dashboard shows search history toggle button
Dashboard search history popup opens and displays recent searches
Profile page shows ProfileImageUpload component
Profile image upload/delete buttons visible on hover
Theme toggle works correctly (dark ↔ light mode)
Theme persistence via localStorage
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_new_features.py - Created 14 new tests for profile image and search history
seed_data_creation: None - using existing test user from previous iteration
